---
title: "compare_four_models_cog_function_matched"
author: "Hui Xin Ng"
date: "2023-07-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("R/load_packages.R")
source("R/helper_functions.R")

source("R/load_brainage_df.R")
source("R/load_merged_df.R")
merged_df <- load_merged_analysis_df()
 # renv::restore()
 # renv::snapshot(type = "implicit")
# renv::restore()
# renv::status()
merged_df

```
  
```{r}
merged_df <- merged_df   %>% filter(visit == 0) %>% mutate(visit = 'Baseline') 
merged_df<- setDT(merged_df)[, lapply(.SD, na.omit), by = stdyptid] 
merged_df
```


# Perform matching to create matched_df
```{r}
# =========================
# Simple age matching (no extra packages)
# =========================
 # Split groups
bd <- merged_df %>% dplyr::filter(dxgroupFK == 1)   # BD
hc <- merged_df %>% dplyr::filter(dxgroupFK == 0)   # HC
merged_df
# Sort by age (helps stability)
bd <- bd %>% arrange(agevisit)
hc <- hc %>% arrange(agevisit)

caliper <- 3  # age tolerance
matched_pairs <- list()
used_hc <- rep(FALSE, nrow(hc))

for (i in seq_len(nrow(bd))) {
  age_bd <- bd$agevisit[i]
  gender_bd <- bd$gender[i]
  
  # Only match within same gender
  valid <- hc$gender == gender_bd
  
  diffs <- abs(hc$agevisit - age_bd)
  diffs[!valid | used_hc] <- Inf
  
  j <- which.min(diffs)
  
  if (is.finite(diffs[j]) && diffs[j] <= caliper) {
    matched_pairs[[length(matched_pairs) + 1]] <- rbind(bd[i, ], hc[j, ])
    used_hc[j] <- TRUE
  }
}

matched_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(matched_pairs)

# Combine matched dataset
matched_df <- do.call(rbind, matched_pairs)

prop.table(table(matched_df$dxgroupFK, matched_df$gender), margin = 1)

for (df in list(matched_df, merged_df)) {
 # print(plot_age_density(df))
  print(run_gender_chisq(df))
  print(run_age_wilcox(df))
}

```

### Figures for matched and unmatched samples
```{r}

bind_rows(
  merged_df %>% mutate(dataset = "Unmatched"),
  matched_df %>% mutate(dataset = "Matched")
) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = agevisit, fill = factor(dxgroupFK))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset) +
  labs(
    title = "Age Distribution Before vs After Matching",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Group (0 = HC, 1 = BD)"
  ) + theme_classic()

bind_rows(
  merged_df %>% mutate(dataset = "Unmatched"),
  matched_df %>% mutate(dataset = "Matched")
) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(dxgroupFK), fill = factor(gender))) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset) +
  labs(
    title = "Gender Proportions Before vs After Matching",
    x = "Group (0 = HC, 1 = BD)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Gender"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```


### Data cleaning for cognitive variables 
```{r}
merged_df
# Cognitive test variables
cog_vars <- c(
 # "trvsoerw", # DKEFS - Trails Visual Scanning Omission Errors Raw (Misses)
 # "trvscerw", # DKEFS - Trails Visual Scanning Commission Errors Raw (False Alarm)
  "trnsctrw", # DKEFS - Trails Number Sequencing Completion Times Raw (TMT A)
  "trlnctrw", # DKEFS - Trails Letter-Number Completion Times Raw (TMT B)
  "trmsctrw", # DKEFS - Trails Motor Speed Completion Times Raw
  "cwicnrw",  # DKEFS - Color Word Interference - Color Naming Raw
  "cwiwrrw",  # DKEFS - Color Word Interference - Word Reading Raw
  "cwiirw",   # DKEFS - Color Word Interference - Inhibition Raw
  "cwiisrw",  # DKEFS - Color Word Interference - Inhibition/Switching Raw
"agevisit",
  "dxgroupFK",
"stroop1","stroop2","tmtb_a","stdyptid","gender")

cog_test_scores_merged <-merged_df %>% dplyr::select(cog_vars)
cog_test_scores_matched <-matched_df %>% dplyr::select(cog_vars)
cog_test_scores_merged

# Remove outliers from cognitive scores
# Using the helper function defined earlier
# =========================================================

outliers_removed_merged  <- remove_sd_outliers(cog_test_scores_merged,   n_sd = 2)
outliers_removed_matched <- remove_sd_outliers(cog_test_scores_matched, n_sd = 2)

 
```
```{r}
# =========================================================
# Check normality of numeric variables after outlier removal
# Returns Shapiro-Wilk p-values by variable
# =========================================================
 
normality_merged <- outliers_removed_merged %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  test_normality()

normality_matched <- outliers_removed_matched %>%
  dplyr::select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  test_normality()

normality_merged > 0.05
normality_matched > 0.05
```
# linear regression sensitivity analyes for matched_df 
```{r} 
cog_test_scores_matched%>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit,stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)  + agevisit , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)


cog_test_scores_matched%>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit, stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)  , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)

lm_results_matched <- outliers_removed_matched %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit,stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)  + agevisit , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)
lm_results_matched 

lm_results_matched <- outliers_removed_matched %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit,stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)    , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)
print(lm_results_matched)
```

```{r}
# before remove outliers
cog_test_scores_merged%>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit, stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)  + agevisit , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)

# outliers removed
lm_results_merged <- outliers_removed_merged %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit,stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)  + agevisit , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)
lm_results_merged 

lm_results_merged <- outliers_removed_merged %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(gender, dxgroupFK, agevisit,stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(test) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    model = purrr::map(data, ~ lm(score ~ factor(dxgroupFK)    , data = .x)),
    tidy  = purrr::map(model, broom::tidy)
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest(tidy) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term == "factor(dxgroupFK)1") %>%
  dplyr::select(test, estimate, statistic, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Test = test,
    Beta = estimate,
    t_value = statistic,
    p_value = p.value
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(p_value)
lm_results_merged
 
```

```{r}
# Variables to check
# target_var <- "trnsctrw"
# 
# other_vars <- c(
#   "cwiisrw",
#   "trlnctrw",
#   "cwicnrw",
#  # "trnsctrw",
#    "cwiirw",
#   "cwiwrrw"
# )
# 
# # Optional: include subject ID if you have one
# id_var <- "stdyptid"
# 
# # Step 1: compute +2 SD cutoff for target variable
# target_cutoff <- mean(df[[target_var]], na.rm = TRUE) + 2 * sd(df[[target_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
# 
# # Step 2: identify people above +2 SD in trlnctrw
# target_outliers <- df %>%
#   filter(!is.na(.data[[target_var]])) %>%
#   filter(.data[[target_var]] > target_cutoff)
# 
# # Step 3: compute +2 SD cutoffs for the other tests
# other_cutoffs <- sapply(other_vars, function(v) {
#   mean(df[[v]], na.rm = TRUE) + 1 * sd(df[[v]], na.rm = TRUE)
# })
# 
# # Step 4: create flags showing whether each trlnctrw outlier is also extreme in other tests
# outlier_check <- target_outliers %>%
#   mutate(
#     across(
#       all_of(other_vars),
#       ~ .x > other_cutoffs[cur_column()],
#       .names = "{.col}_gt2sd"
#     )
#   )
# 
# # Step 5: view subject IDs, raw scores, and flags
#  
# 
# outlier_check %>%
#   select(
#     all_of(c(id_var,"dxgroupFK", target_var, other_vars,
#              paste0(other_vars, "_gt2sd"))))
# 
# outlier_check_long <- outlier_check %>%
#   select(all_of(c(id_var, "dxgroupFK", target_var, other_vars))) %>%
#   pivot_longer(
#     cols = all_of(other_vars),
#     names_to = "test",
#     values_to = "score",
#   ) %>%
#   mutate(
#     cutoff_2sd = other_cutoffs[test],
#     extreme_gt2sd = score > cutoff_2sd
#   ) %>%
#   arrange(.data[[id_var]], test)
# 
# outlier_check_counts <- outlier_check %>%
#   rowwise() %>%
#   mutate(
#     n_other_tests_gt2sd = sum(c_across(ends_with("_gt2sd")), na.rm = TRUE)
#   ) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   select(all_of(c("dxgroupFK",id_var, target_var, "n_other_tests_gt2sd")),
#          ends_with("_gt2sd"))
 
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# Boxplots of cleaned cognitive scores for MERGED dataset
# Useful for compact visual group comparison
# =========================================================

outliers_removed_merged %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(dxgroupFK, gender, stdyptid, agevisit),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(dxgroupFK), y = score,  fill = factor(gender))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ test, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Cognitive Scores by Group (Merged)",
    x = "Group",
    y = "Cognitive Score",
    fill = "Sex"
  )

# =========================================================
# Boxplots of cleaned cognitive scores for MATCHED dataset
# =========================================================

outliers_removed_matched %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(dxgroupFK, gender,agevisit, stdyptid),
    names_to = "test",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(dxgroupFK), y = score, fill = factor(gender))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ test, scales = "free") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    title = "Cognitive Scores by Group (Matched)",
    x = "Group",
    y = "Cognitive Score",
    fill = "Sex"
  )

```

```{r}
pca_result <- outliers_removed_merged %>%
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>%   
  select(-c("agevisit", 'dxgroupFK', 'gender')) %>%  
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%               # drop all-NA columns
  mutate(
    across(everything(), ~ log10(. + 1))            
  ) %>%
  mutate(
 #flip direction so that higher = worse performance
 cwicnrw    = -cwicnrw,
 cwicnrw    = -cwicnrw,
 cwiirw     = -cwiirw    ,
 cwiisrw    = -cwiisrw,
 stroop1    = -stroop1,
 stroop2    = -stroop2,
# tmtb_a     = tmtb_a
    ) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), scale)) %>%  psych::principal(nfactors = 2, rotate = "oblmin")
  
# Bind PCA scores to the full dataframe and flip direction so that higher = better performance
outliers_removed_merged_pc <-outliers_removed_merged %>%
  left_join(
    as.data.frame((pca_result$scores*-1)) %>%
      mutate(stdyptid = outliers_removed_merged$stdyptid),
    by = "stdyptid")
    
# View the final dataframe with PCA scores

loadings_df <- as.data.frame(unclass(pca_result$loadings*1)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("variable") %>% 
  mutate(PC1    = round(PC1   , 2),
         PC2    = round(PC2   , 2))
 
ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(variable, PC2), y = PC2)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(PC2, 2)),
            hjust = ifelse(loadings_df$PC2 > 0, -0.15, 1.15),
            size = 4) +
  expand_limits(y = c(min(loadings_df$PC2) - 0.15,
                      max(loadings_df$PC2) + 0.15)) +
  labs(
    title = "PC2 loadings",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Loading"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

ggplot(loadings_df, aes(x = reorder(variable, PC1), y = PC1)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(PC1, 2)),
            hjust = ifelse(loadings_df$PC1 > 0, -0.15, 1.15),
            size = 4) +
  expand_limits(y = c(min(loadings_df$PC1) - 0.15,
                      max(loadings_df$PC1) + 0.15)) +
  labs(title = "PC1 loadings",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Loading"
  ) + theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

# Extract eigenvalues from the PCA result
eigenvalues <- pca_result$values
 # Calculate the proportion of variance explained by each principal component
variance_explained <- eigenvalues / sum(eigenvalues)

# Create a scree plot
plot(1:length(variance_explained), variance_explained, type = "b", 
     xlab = "Principal Component", ylab = "Proportion of Variance Explained", main = "Scree Plot")
```



# ANALYSIS
# Linear regression model with bpad as outcome variable
### Ridge Bpad
```{r}
# Filter out rows with missing bpad_ridge

# fit_rc2_adj <- brm(
#   RC2 ~ bpad_photon* dxgroupFK + agevisit + gender ,
#   data = temp_analysis_df,
#   family = gaussian(),
#   prior = c(
#     prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = "b"),
#     prior(normal(0, 1), class = "Intercept"),
#     prior(student_t(3, 0, 1), class = "sigma")
#   ),
#   chains = 4,
#   iter = 1000,
#   cores = 4,
#   seed = 123
# ) 
 
cor.test(outliers_removed_merged_pc$stroop1, outliers_removed_merged_pc$PC1)

temp_analysis_df <- outliers_removed_merged_pc %>%
  left_join(
    outliers_removed_df %>%
      select(stdyptid, bpad_ridge, bpad_photon, bpad_BrainAgeR, bpad_cnn),
    by = "stdyptid"
  )
temp_analysis_df
```


```{r}

temp_analysis_df <- temp_analysis_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bpad_ridge))
temp_analysis_df
# Regress PC1 on residualized bpad_photon

resid_mod <- lm(bpad_ridge ~ agevisit + gender, data = temp_analysis_df)

resid_bpad_ridge <- resid(resid_mod)
summary(resid_mod) 

pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~ resid_bpad_ridge*dxgroupFK, data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
 
# Get partial eta squared
getPartialEtaSq(pca_cog_mod)

# resid_bpad_ridge	0.178			
# dxgroupFK	0.053			
# resid_bpad_ridge:dxgroupFK	0.015	




# Regress PC1 on residualized bpad_photon
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~ bpad_ridge*dxgroupFK + gender + agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
 

  
```

### PHOTON Bpad
```{r}
temp_analysis_df <- temp_analysis_df %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(bpad_photon))

resid_mod <- lm(bpad_photon ~    agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
resid_bpad_photon <- resid(resid_mod)
summary(resid_mod)

pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~  resid_bpad_photon*dxgroupFK  , data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
getPartialEtaSq(pca_cog_mod)


# Regress PC1 on residualized bpad_photon
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~ bpad_photon*dxgroupFK + gender + agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
 

```


### bpad_BrainAgeR  
```{r}

temp_analysis_df <- temp_analysis_df %>%
  filter(
     !is.na(bpad_BrainAgeR),
   )
temp_analysis_df
resid_mod <- lm(bpad_BrainAgeR ~    agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
resid_bpad_BrainAgeR <- resid(resid_mod)
summary(resid_mod)
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~  resid_bpad_BrainAgeR*dxgroupFK  , data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
getPartialEtaSq(pca_cog_mod) 

# Regress PC1 on residualized bpad_photon
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~ bpad_BrainAgeR*dxgroupFK + gender + agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)

 
```


### bpad_BrainAgeR  
```{r}

temp_analysis_df <- temp_analysis_df %>%
  filter(
     !is.na(bpad_cnn),
   )
resid_mod <- lm(bpad_cnn ~    agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
resid_bpad_bpad_cnn <- resid(resid_mod)
summary(resid_mod)
resid_bpad_bpad_cnn
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~  resid_bpad_cnn*dxgroupFK  , data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
getPartialEtaSq(pca_cog_mod) 

# Regress PC1 on residualized bpad_photon
pca_cog_mod <- lm(PC1 ~ bpad_cnn*dxgroupFK + gender + agevisit, data = temp_analysis_df)
summary(pca_cog_mod)
```
